---
title: Rubberize
page-layout: custom
css: index.css
sidebar: false
toc: false
section-divs: false
---


::::::::: {.grid .px-4 .py-5 .text-center}

:::::: {.g-col-12 .pt-5 .display-1}
Turn Python calculations into clear, typeset mathematics.
::::::

:::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-8 .g-start-lg-3 .pb-1 .fs-1}
Rubberize renders Python calculations as readable mathematical steps, making notebooks easier to review, explain, and document.
::::::

:::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-8 .g-start-lg-3 .pb-5 .d-grid .gap-2 .d-sm-flex .justify-content-sm-center}

::: {.px-3}
[Get Started []{.bi .bi-arrow-right}](get_started.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg .fs-3}
:::

::: {.px-3}
[See Examples](rendering/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg .fs-3}
:::

::::::

:::::::::

---

:::::::::::: {.grid .gap-3 .px-4 .py-5}

::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-xl-4 .g-col-xxl-3 .g-start-xxl-2 .px-3 .py-3}

:::::: {.display-6 .pb-3}
Usage is very simple: Just `%%tap` the cell.
::::::

:::::: {.fs-3}
Instead of leaving results hidden inside code execution, each step of the calculation appears as readable math.

The result is easier to follow, easier to verify, and easier to share with others.
::::::

:::::::::

::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-xl-8 .g-col-xxl-7 .px-3 .fs-3 .d-flex .flex-column}

:::::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-1 .pt-4 .me-2}
\[1\]&nbsp;:
:::

::: {.g-col-11}

```{python}
%reload_ext rubberize
import pint

ureg = pint.UnitRegistry()
```

:::

::::::

:::::: {.grid .gap-3}

::: {.g-col-1 .pt-4 .me-2}
\[2\]&nbsp;:
:::

::: {.g-col-11}

```{python}
%%tap
w = 10.0 * (ureg.kN / ureg.m)  # Load intensity
L = 8.0 * ureg.m               # Beam span

M_max = w * L**2 / 8           # Maximum moment @stack
```

:::

::::::

:::::::::

::::::::::::

---

:::::::::::: {.grid .px-4 .py-5 .fs-3}

::::::::: {.bg-primary .g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-xl-3 .card}

:::::: {.card-body .d-flex .flex-column}

::: {.card-title}
[]{.bi .bi-rocket-takeoff-fill} Get Started
:::

::: {.card-text}
Install Rubberize, load the notebook extension, and render your first calculation.
:::

::: {.mt-auto}
[Start here []{.bi .bi-arrow-right}](get_started.qmd){.btn .btn-light}
:::

::::::

:::::::::

::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-xl-3 .card}

:::::: {.card-body .d-flex .flex-column}

::: {.card-title}
[]{.bi .bi-magic} Rendering Python
:::

::: {.card-text}
See how Python expressions and statements appear when Rubberize renders them.
:::

::: {.mt-auto}
[See examples []{.bi .bi-arrow-right}](rendering/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::::::

:::::::::

::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-xl-3 .card}

:::::: {.card-body .d-flex .flex-column}

::: {.card-title}
[]{.bi .bi-code-square} Custom Converters
:::

::: {.card-text}
Define how Rubberize renders your own functions, classes, and objects.
:::

::: {.mt-auto}
[Explore []{.bi .bi-arrow-right}](advanced/custom_converters.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::::::

:::::::::

::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-xl-3 .card}

:::::: {.card-body .d-flex .flex-column}

::: {.card-title}
[]{.bi .bi-sliders} Config Reference
:::

::: {.card-text}
Complete reference for all Rubberize configuration options and defaults.
:::

::: {.mt-auto}
[Browse options []{.bi .bi-arrow-right}](config_reference.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::::::

:::::::::

::::::::::::
